title: The Hearts Mod
description: A mod that makes any entity drop a heart
body: This mod makes any entity drop a heart when it does not just players and when the player joins or starts their world they will start with one heart and they can keep obtaining hearts and get more powerful and each entity drops at least one heart but if the dificulty is set to hard then the player will start with just half a heart and each heart just adds half a heart instead of a whole one. WARNING: This mod works by using attribute modifiers so any mod that also uses attribute modifiers may conflict
